steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The stated goal is to provide a specific example of what municipalities provide. The notes supply exactly one concrete example: water treatment.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — provides population statistics: Population data does not name a service municipalities provide. ✗
  • Choice B — describes municipality count: The number of municipalities says nothing about what services they offer. ✗
  • Choice C — names water treatment as a service: This is the specific example from the notes that directly fulfills the stated goal. ✓
  • Choice D — mentions services generally without a specific example: Vague reference to 'services' does not satisfy the requirement for a concrete, named example. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
